name: One Bullet To Grimace
description: One Bullet to Grimace is a shooting game where the player needs to control a bullet after firing it. The bullet can be steered left and right to target multiple enemy grimaces. The objective is to destroy all enemies to win. The game features 50 levels. Website Developer <a href='https://www.bestcrazygames.com/'>https://www.bestcrazygames.com/</a>
instructions: A left D right for mobile use buttons
tags: Android, Grimace, Grimace Shake, HTML5, iPad, iPhone, Mentolatux, Mobile, Shoot, Shooting, Unity3D, WebGL
